info.title: Oracle Eloqua Marketing Cloud Service REST API
info.description: The Oracle Eloqua Marketing Cloud Service REST API enables you to extend the product functionality, build Apps, and perform high volume data transfers. It includes the Application REST API (v1.0 and v2.0), Bulk API (v2.0), and OData Reporting API.

servers.description: Oracle Eloqua instance. Use login.eloqua.com/id to discover your base URL.
